title: Separate schema per bounded context — no cross-context belongs_to
prompt: MyApp.Accounts.User has id. MyApp.Billing.Invoice belongs to a user, but the Accounts and Billing contexts must stay independent. Model Invoice with a plain integer `user_id` field rather than `belongs_to :user, MyApp.Accounts.User` — so Billing doesn't import Accounts. Write the Invoice schema to lib/my_app/billing/invoice.ex.
tier_rationale: Single-schema output with a specific architectural rule. Easy because the rule is explicit in the prompt.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes plugin: 'Query through the context, not across associations. Keeps contexts independent and testable.'
